query: why was the api returning 500 errors

beads.title: Lowered the database connection timeout to one second
summary: An infrastructure change set the DB connection timeout much more aggressively

beads.title: Database queries timed out under load
summary: Slow queries began exceeding the new aggressive timeout during traffic peaks

beads.title: Requests failed at the gateway
summary: The gateway began rejecting a large share of incoming requests

beads.title: Runbook: why was the api returning 500 errors
summary: Incident runbook for triaging why the api was returning 500 errors during outages

query: why did the search feature break

beads.title: Reindexed search with a new text analyzer
summary: The search index was rebuilt using a different tokenizing analyzer

beads.title: Index schema mismatch appeared
summary: The rebuilt index no longer matched the query parser expectations

beads.title: Queries returned no results
summary: User queries started returning empty result sets across the product

beads.title: Why the search feature works: design doc
summary: Architecture document explaining why the search feature works the way it does

beads.title: Incident channel: the search feature broke
summary: Slack channel opened by oncall when the search feature broke for customers

query: why did the ci build slow down

beads.title: Enabled full link-time optimization in release builds
summary: The build config turned on aggressive whole-program LTO for releases

beads.title: Compilation times increased substantially
summary: Each compile pass took far longer once LTO was enabled

beads.title: Pipeline duration grew
summary: End-to-end pipeline wall-clock time roughly doubled
